summary: Package Scope Items Qty/Total and Materials Tab Package Filter - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 6/6 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright automation. Both features are fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: PackageScopeItemInput model correctly includes quantity field with default=1
Backend: Total is auto-calculated as quantity × unit_rate when creating/updating packages
Backend: GET /api/packages returns scope_items with quantity, unit_rate, and total fields
Frontend: Scope Items section in Package dialog shows 5 columns: Name, Unit, Qty, Rate, Total
Frontend: Total column displays auto-calculated value (Qty × Rate) formatted as Indian currency
Frontend: Materials tab has Package filter dropdown (data-testid='material-package-filter') with 'All Materials' default
Frontend: When package selected, shows package materials table with Material Name and Brand columns
Frontend: 'Edit Package Materials' button (data-testid='edit-pkg-materials') opens package edit dialog
Frontend: Switching to 'All Materials' shows standard materials master table with search/filter controls
seed_data_creation: Created test packages during testing (prefixed with TEST_), cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Package Scope Items now have 5 columns: Name, Unit, Qty, Rate, Total. Total is auto-calculated (Qty × Rate). Materials tab has Package filter dropdown - when a package is selected, shows that package's materials in a table with Material Name and Brand columns. 'Edit Package Materials' button opens the package edit dialog. Test packages: Basic Package (2 materials: Cement, Sand), Premium Package (2 scope items with qty, 2 materials).

Package Scope Items Qty/Total.5 columns visible: PASS - Name, Unit, Qty, Rate, Total columns in Add/Edit Package dialog
Package Scope Items Qty/Total.Total auto-calculation: PASS - Total = Qty × Rate, displayed as Indian currency (₹5,000 for 10 × 500)
Package Scope Items Qty/Total.Backend quantity field: PASS - POST/PATCH /api/packages accepts quantity in scope_items
Package Scope Items Qty/Total.Backend total calculation: PASS - GET /api/packages returns scope_items with calculated total

Materials Tab Package Filter.Package selection: PASS - Dropdown shows all packages, selecting one filters view
Materials Tab Package Filter.Package materials table: PASS - Shows Material Name and Brand columns when package selected
Materials Tab Package Filter.Edit Package Materials button: PASS - data-testid='edit-pkg-materials' opens package edit dialog
Materials Tab Package Filter.All Materials view: PASS - Standard materials table with search/filter controls when 'All Materials' selected
